title: More Cartography
description: Adds explorer maps for key biomes.
body:
![A player in a cherry grove biome, looking towards an ice spike biome in the distance.  They have a half-explored map in their offhand with a red x in the ice spikes biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d71a2bcadb413a27c6fc42aa79ae8ceb7fe62f4.png)

---

No more hours spent searching for coral fans or packed ice!  This mod lets you trade with the cartographer for maps that lead to rare biomes nearby.

There are maps available for the bamboo jungle, cherry grove, eroded badlands, ice spikes, mushroom fields, and warm ocean biomes.
